UI_13.message: Error: You must choose pages to scan. Go to options.

UI_2.message: Open one of the recommended tabs and choose an option:

UI_6.message: and just run the desired option:

UI_7.message: Find more info and change limits on the

UI_9.message: Full scan this page (or the opened post)

after_text1.message: Was it useful? if you like my extension, please, give it 5 stars and write a nice REVIEW. This support me and I’ll work more on new features ;)

all_friends_selected_button.message: ALL friends were selected, now you can check the list and click on "Send Invites" button (%s)

before_running_script.message: BEFORE running the script, find the tab with Invite buttons, it may be (some links may not open):

confirm_likers_list.message: We detected that a list is open. If this list contains likers and you want to invite only the likers of this post, click OK. If this is a shared post, click Cancel to proceed with the next step.

confirm_shared_posts_scan.message:
Shared posts are OPEN. If you want to scan ONLY shared posts now, press OK. If you cancel, we will close shared posts (if possible) and scan the page as usual. Shared posts scanning works in English Facebook only.
The script will use the next page name (if it is wrong, run in another tab or set settings to post comments with the default profile): %s

contact_us_problems.message: If you notice any problems, send us your script version and some screenshots.

creator_studio_home_error.message:
ERROR! You are in the HOME tab of Creator Studio, no posts here!
OPEN Creator Studio -> Content Library -> Posts and run the script there. Or any other tab that we support: Home, Notifications, new Business Suite etc

daily_limit_zero.message: Check settings -> Daily limit -> Limit for single page. Since you set it to 0, no invites can be sent for this page.

descr_inv.message: With a single click, you can scan all posts from your Facebook pages and invite who liked posts to follow your page.

didnt_find_posts_reload.message: . Error: didn't find posts after reload. Will try to reload the page again in 1 minute. Please wait...

do_not_use_anymore.message: Try in 24 hours, FB limit should be reset.

error1.message: ERROR! No posts found! Run the script in Business Suite, Content Management or Publishing Tools tab where the list of posts is shown! If something is wrong, contact me at info@invitelikecomment.com with details and I'll try to help you ;)

example_user_name_title.message:
Example: poster name is Alessandro del Piero. You can use:
%name1% - to write 'Alessandro del Piero' (full name)
%name2% - to write 'Alessandro' (first word of the name)
%name3% - to write 'Piero' (last word of the name)
Example: Hello, %name2%! Some useful text here.

extension_stopped_fb_popup.message: Extension stopped. Facebook popup message was detected.

extension_stopped_shared_posts.message: Extension stopped. We were scanning only opened shared posts.

extension_stopped_visible_likers.message: Extension stopped. We were scanning only list of likers shown on the screen.

facebook_limit_block.message: Error: Facebook popup message shown, read it. If you see an error 'going too fast' or 'anti spam limitation': click on 'let us know' and (important!) report this to Facebook, set timeout 8-10 sec for invites (or 10-15 for comments) and do not use Facebook at the same time. Try again in 24h. This happens rarely even if you invite/scroll manually.

facebook_not_english.message: Attention: Facebook not in English – switch to English if it doesn't work as expected.

facebook_not_english_html.message: Attention: Facebook not in English – switch to English if it doesn't work as expected.

facebook_notifications_url_warning.message: Attention! Facebook may open posts in a new page and if that happens: change the URL of Notifications page from business.facebook to www.facebook (facebook doesn't have access to the own domain from the business one)

facebook_ram_tip.message: 💡 Tip: Facebook can use a lot of RAM. "Aw, Snap!" errors (especially on notebooks) usually mean low memory. If you ever get that error - try EDGE browser (it manages ram better) or try to run it in a different place.

fast_scan_before.message: skip the post if 0 people were invited after

fast_scan_title.message: Use this once you have processed all your posts. If the script doesn't find people to invite, it will skip this post and go to the next one.

fb_popup_report.message: Error: Facebook popup message shown. Click 'let us know' and report to Facebook, wait 24h and try again. This is a normal limitation, it happens even if you click manually.

friends_invite_result.message: FRIENDS INVITE: %s of %s friends were invited. Try also to invite fans (who liked your posts)!

friends_list_scroll_limit.message: We have a limit of %s scroll tries for this friends list

full_scan_desc.message: scans ALL posts on the page and then stops

home_tab_no_posts.message: ERROR! You are in the HOME tab of Creator Studio, no posts here! OPEN Creator Studio -> Content Library -> Posts.

how_to_select_few_posts.message: how to select just a few posts? Works in Creator Studio for old pages

ignore_next_runs.message: and ignore on next runs (in some tabs only).

invite_like_disabled.message: ATTENTION: check Settings better, you have disabled Invite and Like features!

invite_who_liked_your_comments.message: Invite who liked comments posted by you on shared posts

invites_sent_last_24h.message: Invites sent in the last 24 hours:

invites_sent_last_30d.message: Invites sent in the last 30 days:

inviting_everyone_in_list_full.message: Inviting Everyone in the List (Limit = %s)... %s invited so far...

lc_canceled_subscription.message: You have canceled your subscription! If you have any problems with the script - contact us via email:

lc_insert_label.message: Insert the license code (lost it? Use email if you added it previously):

lc_invite_failed.message: After 3 attempts to press the 'INVITE' button, the server did not accept it. You may have reached the daily limit, or there may be a temporary limitation or lag. Try clicking manually or wait 24h. If you can invite manually, contact us via email (take a full screenshot of this page and include the script version).

lc_last_msg_error.message: Last message received from the verification server:

lc_never_share_email.message: We will never use, sell, or share your email. The main purpose is to help you restore the code if you lose it.

lc_not_active2.message: >> License NOT active. Click here to manage your license <<

lc_one_post_option.message: Or open the list of likers and run the script to scan only this post.

lc_paid_active.message: >> PAID version. Click here to manage your license <<

lc_paid_not_active.message: >> PAID version NOT Active. Click here to manage your license <<

lc_purchase_needed.message: you need to purchase the script to use ALL features.

lc_purchase_website.message: You can purchase it on our website.

lc_receive_license.message: Receive email 1 week before the license/subscription expires

lc_receive_news.message: Receive important news about our scripts (rarely, max 2-3 per YEAR!)

lc_scanning_post.message: >> Please, wait we are scanning the post in a separate tab <<

lc_searching_license.message: We are searching for your license...

lc_server_update.message: FB INVITER: code was updated. Reload the page and try again now.

lc_server_update_msg.message: FB INVITER: code was updated. Reload the page and try again now. Message from server:

lc_trial_active2.message: FREE 3 DAYS TRIAL is now active

lc_trial_ended.message: >> FREE TRIAL ENDED! Click here to manage your license <<

lc_try_3days.message: Try any of our scripts for 3 days for free and then purchase a license on our website.

lc_try_without_limitations.message: so try the script with limited invites (paid version has no limits).

lc_unknown_error.message: UNKNOWN ERROR: if you see this and didn't receive the email - contact us at:

lc_validating_license.message: We are validating your license. Please wait a few seconds. If it takes too long, try again later. Do not use VPN.

lc_wrong_license_contact.message: and download the correct script. If you purchased a wrong license, send us an email:

limit_err1.message: Facebook has shown an error. Read it! If you see 'invited too fast' / 'spam limitation', increase timeouts (how to increase: close the list of people and run the script) and DO NOT use the Facebook at the same time. Try again in 24h. This happens even if you invite manually, after ~24h it should work fine again. Sometimes you have to wait for 2-3 days to reset this.

no_posts_found_err2.message: ERROR! No posts found! Run the script on Business Suite, Inbox+, Home page or Notifications tabs where list of posts is shown! If something is wrong - contact me by %s with some info and I'll try to help you ;) [err 2]

no_posts_in_content_library.message: ERROR! I don't see posts here! Did you open Content Library -> Posts? Try to run there, also you can click on "?" icon and select "Go back to Publishing tools tab", in this way you will have access to BOTH tools and can run the script again.

one_phrase_random.message: If you set more than 1 phrase - one of them will be randomly selected.

only_shared_posts_enabled.message: ATTENTION: You have enabled ONLY shared posts feature. Run extension in Business Suite, Facebook must be in English!

pLocN10.message: Please, insert the license code or email if you forgot it but previously connected it to your email.

pLocN11.message: Do you want to remove the license from this browser? Click YES/OK

pLocN2.message: You can invite max %s per day, come back tomorrow or purchase the script

pLocN4.message: Free trial is over, or your license is not active. You can use only the FREE feature: open the list of likers and then start the script, or purchase the paid version.

pLocN5.message: License was verified! Please, save it somewhere OR add your email so we can send it to you if you lose it.

pLocN6.message: License was verified! In case you lose it, you can restore it using your email.

pLocN7.message: Too many requests sent, wait a 30 sec before trying again! Do not use VPN.

pLocN8.message: Please insert the license first (you can purchase it on our website). If you lost your license, insert the email you saved when you purchased it.

pLocN9.message: Please, check better the license you inserted. It is not correct. If you lost your license - insert the email you saved with it when purchased.

pause_before_time.message:
.
We take a pause (you set in settings) every %s invites for %s minutes (+- 1%). Continue at

profile_page_warning.message: ATTENTION! You are running the script on a profile.php page, which is very old and may not work. Try running the script in a different tab!

real_time_desc.message: by default scans 5 newest posts, takes a pause and starts scanning them again and again

redirect.message: Redirecting to the Posts tab, run script one more time.

review.message: Did you find it useful? Please leave a review...

run_in_supported_tabs.message: Attention! We suggest you to run the script in the Business Suite, Publishing tools, Creator Studio, Ads manager tab. If more than 1 post is opened on the same page, script doesn't work well.

run_script_there.message: And run the script there. We suggest to try more than one tab, sometimes FB may not show some users in some tabs.

save_ram.message: SAVE RAM (release processed likers from the RAM)

script_scanned_selected_posts.message: Script scanned only posts that you SELECTED.

scrolls_in_new_publishing_tools.message: Scrolls in new Publishing Tools tab:

set_text_at_least_5_chars.message: (set the text, at least 5 chars per phrase)

switch_tab_info.message: Do not switch tabs or minimise; the browser may stop the script. Keep 5% of the window visible or use Picture-in-Picture extension.

too_many_add_friend_buttons.message:
Oh, we have a problem!
I see too many "Add Friend" buttons. We should see "Invite" buttons instead.

Check another tab with Invite buttons and run the script there. Can't find them? Are you using the correct profile? Try changing the profile to match your page. Or contact Facebook to enable the Invite feature for your page: https://www.facebook.com/business/help

too_many_pages_alert.message: %s. You have too many pages, we will trim the list a little.

trial_next_options_only_mpv.message: Next options are available only in Multi-Pages version:

unsupported_language_alert.message: Attention! Your Facebook language (%s) is not supported by the script and it may not work. Please change Facebook language to ENGLISH.

use_user_name_in_text.message: You can use user's name in the text:
